employee-kubernetes-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add dependency management for hazelcast-client to control its version explicitly.

employee-kubernetes-service/src/main/jav.general_idea: Replace String.format with the Java 15+ String.formatted method for cleaner string interpolation.

employee-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit JUnit Jupiter dependency to the project.

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for logging statements.
Replace String.format with String.formatted for logging statements.
Replace String.format with String.formatted for logging statements.
Replace String.format with String.formatted for logging statements.
Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization best practices and suppress warnings.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: Without @Serial, Java 16+ compilers may emit warnings about serializable fields not being annotated, though it is not a hard compile error in all configurations, it is a required modernization for strict compliance.

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 runner import as it is no longer used.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: The import is unused after removing the @RunWith annotation; while not strictly a compile error if the class exists, it is dead code removal associated with the migration.

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 @RunWith annotation in favor of JUnit 5 native support.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.why_exists: JUnit 5 does not use @RunWith; keeping it may cause confusion or runtime issues if mixed with JUnit 5 engine, though Spring Boot 3 handles this gracefully. It is part of the migration to JUnit 5.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit JUnit Jupiter dependency to ensure test framework availability.
Remove explicit version pinning for Hibernate Core to allow Spring Boot to manage the version.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field for Java 14+ serialization best practices.
